config.how-hungry.title: How Hungry? Config
Does hunger system even need to work?
How much hunger points (2 points=1 chicken leg) is needed to run (-1 to not disable running)
config.how-hungry.server.negative_effect: Applies a random negative effect if player is hungry
Applies negative effects on player only if they're running
How much hunger points (2 points=1 chicken leg) is needed to apply negative effects
How much to wait before applying next negative effect (in ticks)
How much the negative effect lasts (in ticks)
text.how-hungry.hunger_disabled: [how-hungry]: Hunger is disabled on this server
modmenu.summaryTranslation.how-hungry: Modify hunger system as much as you want.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.how-hungr:
Allows you to disable hunger entirely or change it's behaviour quite drastically:
- Change amount of saturation needed to run
- Change if hunger does damage
- Which effects apply to player if they're hungry
